extract: Moltres (Japanese: ファイヤー Fire) is a dual-type Fire/Flying Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation I. In Galar, Moltres has a dual-type Dark/Flying regional form that was introduced in The Crown Tundra expansion. Neither Kantonian Moltres nor Galarian Moltres are known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Articuno and Zapdos, it is one of the three legendary birds of Kanto. It is the last Pokémon in the Coastal Kalos Pokédex.
